[**A decent high-current relay for many uses**](https://www.amazon.com/review/RX2RBT0RH22JL/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8)

Reviewed in the United States on December 2, 2023




Vine Customer Review of Free Product








Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.



Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

















Im liking the detachable pigtail connector and steel fastening tab. This makes it convenient to keep secured where installed, and also makes wiring it, a little simpler. Current capacity is rated 40 amps @ 14vDC, so thats able to handle whatever big radiator fan motor or high power spotlamp you've got in mind for it. Also, something notable, is the ability for each pigtail connector to lock side-by-side with each other; forming a united rail that holds very strongly. Each relay seems to be rather well-sealed, so I cannot inspect the insides, nor can water easily find its way in either. Thats okay with me, because water is usually what kills off every aftermarket relay! I dont see that ever being an issue with these badboys. Aint nothing getting in there! This product gets my full approval, but the user must be mindful of un-supressed flyback voltage potential and please...play it safe by using an IN4007 diode or a 20-100ohm resistor, externally on the relay coil! Flyback voltage is dangerously high and can easily fry some component in a computer. Transistors are rather susceptible to this voltage spike.
